interactions.summary: After Jiang leaves, Sneako gives a host-only outro: he apologizes again for the Gabriel/Iblis mistake, says exhaustion from editing and war coverage is visible, praises the interview, and signals that the back-and-forth with Jiang will continue.
interactions.speaker_attribution: Sneako host-only outro after Jiang leaves.

speaker_notes.note: Host-only outro; Jiang is no longer participating.

chronology_notes.note: The host says this is a continuing series and wishes Jiang luck with the Patrick Bet-David appearance planned for the next day after this 2026-04-06 interview.
